name: test_create_item_positive
description: Tест-кейс №1. Создание объявления с валидными данными
statusTrace: self = , kwargs = {} def json(self, **kwargs): r"""Decodes the JSON response body (if any) as a Python object. """ if not self.encoding and self.content and len(self.content) > 3: # No encoding set. JSON RFC 4627 section 3 states we should expect # UTF-8, -16 or -32. Detect which one to use; If the detection or # decoding fails, fall back to `self.text` (using charset_normalizer to make # a best guess). encoding = guess_json_utf(self.content) if encoding is not None: try: return complexjson.loads(self.content.decode(encoding), **kwargs) except UnicodeDecodeError: # Wrong UTF codec detected; usually because it's not UTF-8 # but some other 8-bit codec.
